caption: In an indoor setting resembling a formal meeting or hearing, a woman and a man are seated side-by-side. The woman, wearing glasses and a dark jacket, sits with her hands clasped over a white folder. The man, also wearing glasses, is dressed in a light gray suit jacket, white shirt, and a brown tie. Both individuals have blue rectangular identification badges pinned to their jackets. Across the sequence, the man is seen gesturing with his right arm. He starts with his hand lowered, then raises it to lift a small wooden gavel. By the final frames, he holds the gavel aloft, poised as if to strike a surface. The background consists of gray seating and other partially visible attendees. No legible text is visible on the badges or other objects in the scene.
